description: Add 3 built-in agent profiles to agent-runtime-config.v2.json: 'em' (Engineering Manager — task prioritization, queue management, scheduling), 'po' (Product Owner — requirements, vision, acceptance criteria, deliverable validation), 'swe' (Software Engineer — code implementation, testing, code review). Each gets a tailored system prompt, appropriate MCP tool access patterns, and role-specific capabilities flags. Update the default pipeline to use appropriate personas per phase (e.g., requirements phase uses 'po', implementation uses 'swe').
title: Define built-in agent personas: EM, PO, and SWE with distinct prompts and tool access
